# DO NOT EDIT

Every file in this directory is an auto-generated mirror of `src/Unidote.Core/`.
It is overwritten on every run of `scripts/sync-core.*` and by the `sync-core` GitHub Actions workflow on every push to `main`.

To change Core logic, edit `src/Unidote.Core/**/*.cs` and re-run the sync.
Edits made directly in this folder WILL BE LOST.
